sections.paragraph: masc. prop. a rampart, mound, built up and filled in with stones and earth (Chaldee מִלֵּיתָא). Specially-(a) [Millo], part of the citadel of Jerusalem, 2Sa 5:9 1Ki 9:15, 24 1Ki 9:24 11:27 1Ch 11:8 2Ch 32:5, as to which, see Hamelsveld, Geogr. Bibl. t. ii. p. 35, seqq. It appears to be the same as בֵּית מִלֹּוא 2Ki 12:21. But-(b) מִלֹּוא Jud. 9:6 , 20 Jdg 9:20, is a castle of the Shechemites, and בֵּית מִלֹּוא its inhabitants, ibid.
